title: Drug and health products available in Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Drug and health products available in Canada
Find out about natural health products, human and veterinary drugs, medical devices and newly patented medicines. Also access drug and health product databases.

## Services and information

### Natural health products
Identify natural health products with an approved licence, report side effects, access regulations and submit a licence application.

### Drugs and medical devices
Learn about drug products and medical devices, including licensing, use, side effects, safety and disposal. Also search drug, health product and medical device databases.
Get information on public consultations, policies and programs, and adverse reactions to veterinary drugs.

### Patent Register for medicinal ingredients
Access the Patent Register to find medicinal ingredients, their associated patents and expiry dates.
